TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Mamnoon_Hussain, title = Mamnoon_Hussain, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mamnoon_Hussain} }

S.FORM: = Mamnoon Hussain = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 12 jiyax 23 ka Mamnoon Hussain ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Pakistan ta sayang o kiya ka Mamnoon Hussain, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 9 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = mamnoon ħussain = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka mamnoon ħussain ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan pakistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka mamnoon ħussain, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Mamnoon Hussain = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 12 jiyax 23 ka Mamnoon Hussain ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Pakistan ta sayang o kiya ka Mamnoon Hussain, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 9 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = mamnoon ħussain = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka mamnoon ħussain ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan pakistan ta sajaŋ o kija ka mamnoon ħussain, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
